pageContext.name: Intercessors Brother Marine 02
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Intercessors Brother Marine 02 Action Figure, as part of the Imperial Fists series from the line of Warhammer 40K action figures!  The Imperial Fists are among the First Founding Chapters of the Space Marines and stand out among other Space Marines as they have no fixed homeworld. Instead, they rely upon their ancient mobile space fortress named Phalanx which serves as both fortress and monastery.  Intercessors are the standard heavy infantry unit of the Primaris Space Marines, they are both the most numerous and most strategically versatile warriors in a battle squad. A Brother, or Battle-Brother, is the most common unit for a Space Marine to be assigned to after passing their trials, as well as being a general form of address Space Marines will use when addressing one another.
